notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Carson Benge reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Matt Chapman. Mark Vientos scores. Jared Young scores. Marcus Semien to 3rd. Fielding error by first baseman Jerar Encarnacion.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Matt Chapman singles on a ground ball to third baseman Bo Bichette. Matt Chapman to 2nd. Matt Chapman advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Bo Bichette.
